Trigger and call another sub flow.
Call a flow that has \"Callable Flow\" t: Call a flow that has "Callable Flow" trigger
Return response to the original flow: Return response to the original flow
The flow to execute. Only published flow: The flow to execute. Only published flows with a "Callable Flow" trigger appear here — unpublished or disabled subflows are hidden.
Choose Simple for key-value or Advanced: Choose Simple for key-value or Advanced for JSON.
Waiting to be triggered from another flo: Waiting to be triggered from another flow
The schema to be passed to the flow: The schema to be passed to the flow
Stream a CSV from a URL and call a subfl: Stream a CSV from a URL and call a subflow once per batch of rows, without loading the whole file into memory.
A direct URL to the CSV file. It is stre: A direct URL to the CSV file. It is streamed, not downloaded into memory.
The subflow to call for each batch. Publ: The subflow to call for each batch. Published flows with a "Callable Flow" trigger appear here; disabled flows are marked "(inactive)".
How many CSV rows to send in each subflo: How many CSV rows to send in each subflow call.
Optional data sent to every subflow call: Optional data sent to every subflow call alongside the batch rows. Reference the output of a previous step.
